title: 'Serious risk of radioactive contamination': Iran FM writes to UN over Bushehr nuclear strikes
summary_full: Iran's foreign minister has alerted the UN to grave risks of radioactive contamination following recent US-Israeli strikes near the Bushehr nuclear power plant. A projectile near the facility killed one staff member, prompting IAEA concerns about escalating attacks near nuclear infrastructure and the potential for accidents.
